page_metadata.bioconda__summary: revtrans - performs a reverse translation of a peptide alignment.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Revtrans takes a set of dna sequences, virtually translates them, aligns the peptide sequences, and uses this as a scaffold for constructing the corresponding dna multiple alignment.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RevTrans takes a set of DNA sequences, virtually translates them, aligns the peptide sequences, and uses this as a scaffold for constructing the corresponding DNA multiple alignment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RevTrans takes a set of DNA sequences, virtually translates them, aligns the peptide sequences, and uses this as a scaffold for constructing the corresponding DNA multiple alignment.
